schedule-3:line2.label: Child & dependent care credit
schedule-3:line2.so: Tani waa credit-ka kharashka daryeelka carruurta ama qof kale oo aad masuul ka tahay, intaad shaqaynayso.
schedule-3:line2.en: This is a credit for child or dependent care expenses you paid while working.

schedule-3:line3.label: Education credits
schedule-3:line3.so: Tani waa credit-yada canshuurta ee la xidhiidha kharashka waxbarashada kolejka.
schedule-3:line3.en: These are tax credits related to college or higher-education expenses.

schedule-3:line4.label: Retirement savings credit (Saver's Credit)
schedule-3:line4.so: Tani waa credit dadka dakhliga yar leh, oo loogu talagalay lacagta ay geliyaan akoonkooda hawlgabka.
schedule-3:line4.en: This is a credit for lower-income workers who contribute to a retirement account.

schedule-3:line8.label: Total nonrefundable credits
schedule-3:line8.soTitle: Credit-yada aan la soo celin karin ee guud
schedule-3:line8.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee credit-yada Qaybta I, oo loo daro Form 1040 sanduuqa 20. Credit-yadan waxay dhimi karaan canshuurtaada ilaa $0 oo kaliya, lacagna laguma soo celin karo.
schedule-3:line8.en: This is the total of Part I's credits, added into Form 1040, line 20. These credits can only reduce your tax to $0 — they don't create a refund on their own.

schedule-3:line15.label: Total other payments & refundable credits
schedule-3:line15.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee lacag-bixinnada kale iyo credit-yada la soo celin karo, oo loo daro Form 1040 sanduuqa 31.
schedule-3:line15.en: This is the total of other payments and refundable credits, added into Form 1040, line 31.
